prompt: Based on the smart home control panel UI component toolkit, create a thermostat settings page with temperature slider and mode toggles.
prompt_refined: Generate a smart home thermostat settings page. The design should adhere to the neumorphism UI style present in image 1. Incorporate a prominent temperature control slider, visually represented by a large circular dial similar to the one found in the center-right of image 1. Below this dial, arrange a set of mode toggles, specifically using the style of the 'Heat', 'Cool', 'Fan', and 'Dry' circular buttons from image 1. Additionally, include a digital temperature display element, akin to the one located in the top-right of image 1, typically positioned above the temperature slider.
objects: Digital temperature display element (positioned above the dial)
'Heat' mode toggle circular button (below the dial)
'Cool' mode toggle circular button (below the dial)
'Fan' mode toggle circular button (below the dial)
'Dry' mode toggle circular button (below the dial)
